cases.prompt: Compliance check: 'Taste the authentic Pakistani flavours at Lazzat — Brampton's best Desi grill!'
cases.expected_behavior: FAIL on checks 7, 8, 20. Also fails Seven Tests (Specificity, Comparison, AI word scan). Rewrite to globally-neutral framing. Output Compliance Block with Status ❌ REWRITE, then deliver rewritten version with Status ✅ PASS.
assertions: provides a rewritten version using globally-neutral framing (e.g., 'A table where everyone belongs.')
final block shows PASS after rewrite

cases.prompt: Compliance check: 'Our charcoal-grilled tikka masala is ready in 60 seconds.'
cases.expected_behavior: FAIL on checks 9, 13, 18. Rewrite with direct-flame / lava-stone + no speed claim + valid menu v14 item name. Note: 'tikka masala' is a banned dish name (but 'Chicken Tikka' as a skewer name is approved).
assertions: flags 'tikka masala' as a banned region-coded dish name
rewritten version uses 'direct flame' / 'lava stone' and a v14 item (e.g., Chicken Tikka skewer over saffron rice)

cases.prompt: Compliance check: 'Direct-flame Chicken Tikka over saffron rice with Lazzat Green sauce. Maple Lodge Farms chicken. A table where everyone belongs. McVean Dr, Brampton.'
cases.expected_behavior: PASS all 40 checks and Seven Tests. Pillar: Menu Spotlight (or Direct Flame / Lava Stone Story). Approver: Lazzat-Brand + Lazzat-Social. Block is delivered clean.
assertions: supplier credential is 'Maple Lodge Farms chicken' (not 'halal-sourced')

cases.prompt: Compliance check caption: 'Halal-sourced meat. JazakAllah to our Brampton family for launch day support!'
cases.expected_behavior: FAIL on check 10 (religious phrase) and check 11 (halal on customer-facing). Rewrite to 'Maple Lodge Farms chicken' and 'Thank you, Brampton'.
assertions: rewrite uses 'Maple Lodge Farms chicken' and secular thanks

cases.prompt: Compliance check this ad (date is May 2026): 'Brampton's first direct-flame grill — amazing flavours and incredible value.'
cases.expected_behavior: FAIL on launch-window conservatism: 'first', 'amazing', 'incredible' are all superlatives. Rewrite neutralized.

cases.prompt: Compliance check: 'Delve into a vibrant tapestry of curated flavours. It's not just a grill. It's a culinary journey that transforms your experience.'
cases.expected_behavior: FAIL all Seven Tests (Who-wrote-this, AI word scan, Structure scan). FAIL checks 1, 2, 3. Rewrite to plain human voice.
assertions: flags the 'It's not just X. It's Y.' structure
rewrite uses short declarative sentences or fragments

cases.prompt: Compliance check: 'Unlike Cava, our bowls are build-your-own. And unlike Osmow's — where the founders used to work — we actually grill over flame.'
cases.expected_behavior: FAIL on check 24 (competitor name), check 25 (Osmow's disparagement), check 26 (comparison phrasing), and Seven Tests Comparison scan.
assertions: rewrite states Lazzat-only facts (direct flame, lava stone, 17 sauces, Maple Lodge Farms)
if Osmow's lineage must be mentioned, uses forward framing: 'The founders spent over twenty years in the industry. Lazzat is the next idea.'

cases.prompt: Compliance check: 'Our 800-million-year Himalayan salt wall — with 84 minerals — detoxifies the air and boosts immunity.'
cases.expected_behavior: FAIL on checks 22, 34, plus Seven Tests Specificity. Rewrite to sensory-only, locked age, no therapeutic claims.
assertions: flags '800-million-year' (age must be approximately 600 million years)
rewrite uses sensory-only language ('soft pink glow, radiant heat, sensory calm') and 'approximately 600 million years'

cases.prompt: Compliance check: 'Our fresh-squeezed tropical smoothie — real fresh fruit, apple, orange, and hormone-free goodness.'
cases.expected_behavior: FAIL on checks 19, 33, 33e, plus 'hormone-free' is illegal framing for Canadian poultry and 'smoothie' is banned category.
assertions: flags 'fresh fruit' if the fruit is frozen
flags 'apple' as banned in any shake / fruit blend (apple is allowed only inside Lazzat Bean Salad)
rewrite uses 'Shake' or 'Fruit Blend', lists approved ingredients (real fruit, real whole milk, real cream, real cane sugar, ice), and 'Maple Lodge Farms chicken' if meat is referenced

cases.prompt: Compliance check: 'Try our Pure Coconut Shake — just real coconut, milk, and cream. No pineapple, no shortcuts.'
cases.expected_behavior: FAIL on check 33c. The Coconut Shake recipe is coconut + pineapple + milk + cream per Final Shakes 2026-04-26. 'Pure coconut' framing is banned.
assertions: flags 'Pure Coconut Shake' as a banned framing
flags 'No pineapple' as a recipe-accuracy violation
rewrite states the correct recipe: 'Coconut Shake — real coconut + pineapple + milk + cream — $6.99'
may add the locked offer line '+ 1 Real Fruit FREE with any Signature Shake'

cases.prompt: Compliance check: 'Try our new Butterfly Pea Flower Shake — naturally anti-inflammatory and full of phycocyanin antioxidants for immunity support.'
cases.expected_behavior: FAIL on checks 33b, 33d, 22. Butterfly Pea Flower naming is reverted on Final Shakes 2026-04-26 — actual ingredient is Blue Spirulina. Therapeutic claims (anti-inflammatory, immunity, phycocyanin benefits) are CFIA / Food and Drugs Act violations.
assertions: flags 'Butterfly Pea Flower' as legacy naming (use 'Blue Spirulina')
rewrite uses 'Blue Lagoon — pineapple + mango + banana + Blue Spirulina — $8.48' or 'Add Blue Spirulina +$0.99 for natural blue colour'

cases.prompt: Compliance check: 'Build your bowl with our Greek Salad, Mediterranean Salad, or Mexican Fiesta — six flavours from around the world.'
cases.expected_behavior: FAIL on check 33a. All three salad names are legacy v13 — replaced 2026-04-26 by Final Salads. Region-coded modifiers also fail check 7.
assertions: flags 'Mediterranean Salad' as legacy v13 + region-coded
flags 'Mexican Fiesta' as legacy v13 + region-coded
rewrite uses canonical names: 'Cucumber Tomato, Red Cabbage Slaw, Pickled Onion, Sweet Corn & Pepper ⚡, Spiced Chickpea, Lazzat Bean Salad ⭐'
may use the locked salad line: '6 chef-built salads — including our Sweet Corn & Pepper signature and the plant-based Lazzat Bean Salad.'

cases.prompt: Compliance check: 'Add Protein +$2.99, Collagen +$2.49, or Blue Spirulina +$1.49 to any shake or fruit blend. Indulgent flavors like Chocolate or Pistachio work great on our Tropical Blend.'
cases.expected_behavior: FAIL on check 35a (add-on prices wrong) and 33f (indulgent flavors banned on water-base Fruit Blend builds).
assertions: flags 'Chocolate ... on our Tropical Blend' (indulgent flavors are shake-base only — Tropical Blend is water-base)
rewrite uses correct prices: Protein +$1.99, Collagen +$1.99, Blue Spirulina +$0.99
rewrite restricts indulgent flavors to a Shake build, not a Fruit Blend build

cases.prompt: Compliance check: 'Our Spiced Chickpea salad is 100% vegan and fully halal — perfect for your plant-based community.'
cases.expected_behavior: FAIL on check 35b (Spiced Chickpea is vegetarian-only — contains honey) and check 11 (halal on customer-facing surface). Two separate violations.
assertions: flags 'Spiced Chickpea ... 100% vegan' (it contains honey — vegetarian only)
flags 'fully halal' on customer-facing copy (HMA cert pending; voice-and-claims §14.4)
rewrite tags Spiced Chickpea correctly as 'vegetarian, gluten-free, contains honey'
rewrite removes the 'halal' word and uses 'plant-based' or 'vegetarian' as the dietary positioning instead

cases.prompt: Compliance check: 'All Berry Shake ⭐ — four real berries + milk + cream — $7.99. + 1 Real Fruit FREE with any Signature Shake. Not Syrup. Not Flavouring. Real Fruit.'
cases.expected_behavior: PASS all 40 checks and Seven Tests. Pillar: Menu Spotlight. Approver: Lazzat-Brand + Lazzat-Social. Hits canonical name, signature flag, recipe accuracy, locked price, locked offer line, locked hero line.
assertions: uses canonical name 'All Berry Shake' with the ⭐ signature flag
recipe matches Final Shakes (4 real berries + milk + cream)
includes the '+ 1 Real Fruit FREE' locked offer line
includes the 'Not Syrup. Not Flavouring. Real Fruit.' locked hero line
no AI words, no competitor names, no halal language, no therapeutic claims
